creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Clipboard is not working on 10-RELEASE when connecting to Windows 2008 R2 RDP servers. Console output shows it is loading cliprdr:

pacija@kaa:~ % xfreerdp -decorations +clipboard /u:user@example.org /p:mypass /w:1366 /h:740 /v:server.example.org
loading channel cliprdr
connected to server.example.org:3389
Unable to detect time zone
Server does not support XI 2.2

How-To-Repeat: Connect to Windows 2008 R2 RDP server using +clipboard switch
